# SCNetworkReachability

**Class**

The handle to a network address or name.

## Declaration

```swift
class SCNetworkReachability
```

## Data Types

- **SCNetworkReachabilityContext**: Structure containing user-specified data and callbacks used with [doc://com.apple.systemconfiguration/documentation/SystemConfiguration/SCNetworkReachabilitySetCallback(_:_:_:)].

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
